reviews.review_description: Overall this game is a 10 star outta five! Only complaint is it takes forever for new songs to come out! This is my most played vr game. By far! That being said i go through the songs! Please add new songs! Maybe a weekly track and a monthly track pack or something like that! Im begging you for the love of drums everywhere, MORE SONGS! Update; havent played in a while now. Nothing new to look forward too. Thanks developers, way to ruin something so good! All we need is new songs. Can't be that hard. EDIT, once again it's been like months like 4 months or so since there's been any kind of updates can we get some new music this game is a great game it's my favorite game on the whole vr but you've forced me to not play it you can only play so many songs for so long until it just gets boring

developer_response.body: Your wish is my command: Indies are here, and a whole new world awaits

reviews.review_title: Would give 5 stars if it had more songs
reviews.review_description: Yall  gotta add more nu metal/heavy metal there's no korn bizkit or slipknot add better bands im begging like Pantera or slaughter to prevail there's no death core or death metal either good game over all but not heavy stuff

This game is insanely fun and it's a ridiculously taxing workout, if you're looking for that, too. I absolutely love Arcade Mode, but the other modes are also cool, especially if you have experience with drums. Fun for anyone with some rhythm lol.

Removing a couple stars because I'm really unhappy that they're now deleting tracks from an already slim selection of known music. I was just about to purchase a pack with Jimmy Eat World and it's already gone. Come to find out, this is a common thing with this game. All the songs they add are unknown artists and while some of it is fine, it's obviously not as good. Prior to this, Smash Drums was the only game I'd spent money on, but I don't think I'll continue without better music.

developer_response.body:
Hey, sorry about this, I'm working on it to bring them back 🥰
Anything you've purchased is yours to keep, but at the moment, some of them cannot be sold anymore.

reviews.review_description: Just got this game not even a hr ago and I'm already in love with it please add skillet all there songs in a bundle please that would be awesome

Smash Drums would be incredible with more 80s hair metal and modern AOR content. Bands like Nitrate or Treat (“1985”) would fit perfectly, and additions from major acts like Iron Maiden, Kiss, or Tool would really elevate the experience.

It’s also a shame to have missed out on the earlier 1970s and 1980s DLC packs, as that era feels like a natural fit for the game’s style.

This game is great. There are a good variety of songs and genres to play at varying levels of difficulty. And different playing styles. Classic/Fusion/Arcade. All of which are enjoyable in different ways. None of the songs that come with the game are famous, but that doesn't matter. But you can buy packs of well known songs, at a reasonable price, to drum along to if you wish.

MORE CONTENT? c,c   cmon   4/5  downgrade from 5


i change to 5 again becauseeee Update free NICE !

Kickstart my Heart is absolutely the best, I have sweated to that song many many times!!  

Please add others, like this:
"Nothin' But a Good Time" – Poison 
"Girls, Girls, Girls" – Mötley Crüe
"Pour Some Sugar on Me" – Def Leppard
"Cherry Pie" - Warrant

Just to name a few.  Call it the "Hair Band Pack"! I'd pay double/triple for a pack like that.

After much experimenting with the three styles of play, I really like the Fusion Mode.
I love the little touch of the particles spraying up from the drums when you hit them.
The new career mode, gives you a real incentive to play.
Took me awhile to get it going the way I think it plays best, but now I love it, especially with the bHaptics Tact Suit Pro.
Smash On!

I was hesitant to download it at first, but since I got my paycheck and had extra money I said why not. And the game did not disappoint I love the mechanics and everything abt the game they got some amazing songs and I already bought a few once I liked, trust me it is worth the price, I was sad to see that they don’t have any AC/DA or Metallica but I still enjoy this game a lot￼￼

It’s literally like playing guitar hero again as a kid but so much cooler on vr drums! 
Biggest downside is 100% song availability, there’s quite a few but hardly anything for more popular songs. 
Also, no update in over 4 months?? Wth

developer_response.body: Yo! Sorry about the radio silence, a lot of work happened under the hood, which is now ready for prime time: Indies are here!

reviews.review_title: I want to give this 5 stars but...
reviews.review_description: I wanted to get the Hard Rock Legends pack, and, once I try to purchase it and download it, it's not there? The songs show up in my game in the list, and tell me to go to the store to purchase them, but, they aren't in the store. Majorly bummed. Also, I much prefer classic mode, and feel it's kind of lame you can't just play classic mode for campaign. If I hear back regarding the missing add on packs though, I'll update my review.
I am getting up in years and spend a lot of time sitting.  This game gets my heart racing and is a lot of fun.  Lots of different ways to play and plenty of songs!!

This has become favorite Game and quite possibly obsession. The music is awesome and not AI crap. I appreciate the solid my musicianship standards the developer clearly has. So glad to see that it's updated, the recent Changes are really fun. Well the gorilla is annoying but smashing 🍌 is oddly satisfying, Love, Love..
Please add some anime music like naruto or tokyo ghoul or parasyte and noragami aragato op 2 everyone that agree give it a like

Very good game
Wish there was more Fall Out Boy (FOB) and The middle by Jimmy Eat World and more of those 90-2000s emo vibe. Also wish there was some more heavy metal like Disturbed.

reviews.review_title: The Best Drum Game I've Found UPDATED
reviews.review_description:
I was playing a different drum game and it was fun, it included a few good songs, but most of the included songs were pretty awful. Mostly noisy, death metal with no real rhythm or memorable beat. I got chance to try Smash Drums and you guys are head and shoulders a better game/sim. As well as the mechanics of the game, your song options are fantastic. Especially, the time period from the 70's through the early 2000's. That period had a ton of music that was fun, melodic and memorable. 

I recommend the developers continue to mine that time period much more than they have all ready. There were so many fantastic bands at that time, the pickings are unending. How about some from following bands that just popped into my head? :

AC/DC, 
Def Leppard, 
Billy Idol,
Third Eye Blind,
T.Rex
Joan Jett
REO Speedwagon
Collective Soul 
Jimmy Eat World, 
Green Day, 
Cheap Trick,
Tom Petty,
The Offspring,
Gin Blossoms,
Harvey Danger
and many, many more.

Still waiting for a really good new songs. Here's my suggestion: Go to Amazon Music and pick the Classic Alternative Radio song list. Pick some great songs.
Its a good game but im tired of games where you have to pay for REAL songs and there is like no songs at all to play. The drums in the song that you hear is nothing compared to what you play.
Great game
If it Had more song it would be great
I love it
Thats just it, most fun ive had on a vr drumming game

what a workout! i got this game for the quintessential rock band type of experience and have been absolutely blown away with the quality of the atmosphere, and drumming "feel" that you can experience. really pumped that there are so many of my favorite songs to download and play, but i have experienced so many new songs from the base list of songs that are available. bravo team, great game.
I play this with my family
W game
Would love some new music!!!!

As an older guitar hero / rock band fan, I thoroughly enjoy this app/game. I've had the base game for awhile but recently purchased all 4 off the add on packs. I usually play in classic mode which is set up more like rock band with the way the notes display but the other mode is cool too.
Just perfect ;)

I'm addicted to this game! Great selection of songs and the drum parts go along well with the recorded drums, especially on hardcore difficulty. I find that it's mostly accurate.  The extreme kit will occasionally pick up an errant cymbal or snare hit when hitting the rack toms which is annoying when it wrecks your combo.

A couple of requests for updates would be to add a way to rewind in practice mode and maybe have the option to slow down the song more than 70%. That would be helpful when trying to practice some of the harder fills. Also, there is a weird sound in practice mode and I think I sometimes hear a dog barking?? Adding support for a kick drum pedal would be cool too.

All in all, it's a very fun game! 5/5! Fingers crossed for more updates and song packs!
Asesome!

I am waiting for new music from popular artist. Love arcade made super easy to learn but also very challenging. When are we going to get new music? I will change to 5 stars when I can get new songs... take my money, please! 🙏

reviews.review_title: The Best Out There Right Now
reviews.review_description:
The drums feel SO cool. The campaign is basic, but they do it very well. The built-in songs are actually kind of a bop, and the extra songs are chosen very well!

I do recommend maybe adding a new one where it's movie and tv show themes. I mainly got the idea because I was thinking about the Buffy The Vampire Slayer theme and how it would be so sick to play.

Also, a workshop / custom songs that people can upload like in beat saber would be great. WE NEED CUSTOM SONGS

reviews.review_title: Love it but want more music
reviews.review_description: Please add more music! I wouldn’t mind some Pearl Jam, linkin park, and twenty one pilots!

reviews.review_title: Truly one of the absolute best!
reviews.review_description: I got this when it first came out and it has only gotten better and better. So well put together, playing is an absolute joy. I literally never want to stop playing. There is so much in this one app. So polished, so many great features, great music, great environments, drum kits and sticks, avatars, mixed reality and several ways to play - even multiplayer and now campaign mode. You can really get a workout too. Prepare to sweat! Truly:This is why you have a VR headset!

Now that there's a campaign, I've changed my review from 4 to 5 stars. I've been waiting for that since I bought this game over a year ago. The drumming is fun, responsive and this game was made by developers of guitar hero so its definitely one I come back to repeatedly. The only negative is not enough songs in the base game even though there's a lot its annoying to see half the game behind a shopping cart graphic. Other than that, this game is top shelf, decent.

Audio/ video not synchronized,  no option to sync.
Multiplayer has lag spikes that force missed notes. 
Purchased DLCs are not playable in multipayer like Beat Saber.
Multiple drumming interfaces to choose from, but most are horrible comaired to Fusion mode, and some are unfinished. ie hard-core mode available Only in Arcade mode.

Im told to give the 1 person developer a break, but they are working on an indoor powerwashing game that's coming out soon.
There is a wonderful song diversity but it gets prety boring with the same songs so if there could be modded songs or accses to mod it would make me and probably a few more people happier

It’s super fun, like the different options for playing, but can we please get more songs??? 
I have bought the extra packs, but it’s still very limited…

this my go to when i need to rage out and release stress or anger. The concentration helps take my mind off things. Its also really fun and the difficulty ratings make sure it stays challenging. It can get boring after a while, but they do add new music every so often which keeps me coming back for more. Stoked to see the new add ons too.

One of the best music rhythm games ever! Plus you get a sweat out of it! I've been playing this game when it came out as a demo and I had to buy the full game just for more! My only tid bit of gripes with this game is the lack of songs. Now hold on don't me wrong the roster of songs is awesome and it has replayability which for a game like this is cool its just variety and quantity is a thing. Gets some songs like like Japanese anime full openings like Asian Kung-Fu Generation's After Dark or Naruto opening Go! Get more stuff from fan made songs too! If the creators of this game want my input for more lists of songs I would be glad to help. I don't need or want payment of compensation. Five stars. Oh and might wanna fix the issue with the drumsticks. It feels like every time I hit the symbols and drums I don't feel the hd rumble coming from it. And there have been times where hitting the drums and symbols end up being a miss when it shouldn't. 

Quick Edit: Still 5 stars but its already been some years since the game has been out so a custom song editor would be nice. Let people have fun! Also a PC version of this game would be awesome!

This has quickly become one of my favorite games in VR. The action is high, everything does what it’s supposed to do, however. I’m a bit disappointed in the selection of songs. Also the song packs are tiny and don’t feel worth the money. 

Other than that, honestly it’s a really fun game, gets you moving  and is immersive. Would love to see what smash drums 2 could look like.

reviews.review_title: They need to add more music but dub game
reviews.review_description:
They need to add like Cold, Gone Away (a song for Starr), Animal I Have Become, Home by Three Days Grace, Fell on Black Days by Soundgarden,I hate everything about you by Three Days Grace — like some grunge vibes and just chill filler tracks, and some chills. Also add some power metal like Sabaton, that would be awesome 👍
Awesome game, put so many hrs in this game you just get stuck in it. It’s definitely making me wanna get a drum set more than before.

Also ps devs masterpiece of a game if u need a tester I got u and also I would be happy if u added some of them songs cuz there so good and also if u can I'd love to see some Ozzy old rock like paranoid by black Sabbath
Fun times. Its great to try and challenge myself with some of the harder songs
Please make a bundle pack for RHCP songs, please guys, that would be so awesome and really fun to learn. I would gladly pay for it.
doesn't read half your drum hits even through you hit the drum 1000 times

Honestly I wasn’t expecting this game to be any good… at all. But it’s that fun I’m gonna drop my first review. I feel like I’m back in the Guitar Hero: World Tour days. Amazing song options (which is rare for games like this nowadays), intuitive drumming options (you can play on a virtual drum kit or old school guitar hero vibes for example) and genuinely a good cardio workout. I finished my sesh absolutely exhausted and sweating 🤣 
Highly recommend!
This game is as good as beat saber so making it one of the best
Love it, it is so fun to play
Best vr drum gam yet. Could use a more intuitive practice log that can tell you where you need the work.
Lovin the new update!! lets rock!!!!!

i probably have 40 hours on this thing and i don't see myself slowing down anytime soon. the songs that are available are so fun and interesting, and many of them i would not have listened to on my own, so i appreciate the game expanding my musical knowledge as well as being incredibly fun to play and satisfying to master.

Smash Drums is easily one of my favorite VR games. I play it almost every night, and it never gets boring. The gameplay feels great, the visuals are awesome, and smashing drums to music is just insanely fun.

Everything about the game feels polished and energetic — it’s perfect for relaxing after a long day or getting a quick workout while having fun. The song selection is already solid, and I honestly can’t wait for more tracks to be added in the future.

Highly recommended if you like rhythm games or music-based VR experiences! 🎵🥁
Great drumming game reminds me of band hero or guitar hero from back in the day. Love it but.......only 4 song packs. We need more song packs please. I purchased all 4 and need some more.
Works great
Best drum game i have ever played

Just started playing last night and already hooked. I have been looking for something like this ever for a while now and I can see unless hours me playing this. If I had any complaints it would be that it needs more songs from like Weezer, kiss, etc, just more variety. Looking forward to updates.
I play this game every day!

Definitely hitting notes. I'm not off beat and I tried hitting the notes both soft and hard. I KNOW for a fact I hit them and it doesn't register. Getting my money for a music pack I bought and uninstalling. People have been talking about this issue for years and these people do nothing about it and still want you to spend money. I'm sure they'll say it works fine when it doesn't for me and tons of others who reported the same issue. Good lighting in my room, everything is updated and charged. Not supporting devs that want to do this kind of thing. Fix it and update it and improve it or get lost and stop charging money for a broken product. Not a "ME" issue it's 100% a THEM issue. Devs need to check their reports and check these forums of people all reporting these issues and trying to find fixes. A lpt of VR games are like this and it comes off as a momey grab, not something they passionately wanted to make and maintain. Not wasting my time or money.

Game is 🔥‼️ Take it from a household of 55+ MofoZ! You want a good workout? Can you even last for 2 minutes of straight hand action, pounding as hard as you can? Can you? Trust me…. You will struggle ya donkey off! Sweat it off and hear some good ol rock and roll solo or get on and run multi player against another mofo or play in a band and get loose! Super duper fun!
Best of the vr drum type games.  Sucks that not enough players and few updates.

I’m not sure if I’m the only one, but I’m not in favor of the lightning bolt shooting out the drumsticks. The feature is annoying and loud to me. Ive researched to see if it’s a feature I can dismiss or toggle off but alas,there is not. This is my favorite game , and has been for the longest time. I recently purchased an upgraded headset , ￼ quest three, and I’m loving most of the features except for these sticks. If the developers see this, please let me know if there’s something I’m missing!

I honestly love this game. I was recommended this game from a friend. I play 6 different instruments in real life in which one of them is the drums. I like how they have a decent virtual set up of it. They are missing a couple of drums but that’s okay. The only complaint I have is that since it’s VR based you don’t have an actual foot pedal. So I need to get used to the bass drum being next to the snare drum. The symbols are cool. The fact that they implemented they implemented the hi-hat is cool. The positioning is a bit different from the actual thing. Sadly there isn’t an option for a pedal for the hi-hat. But… it’s VR so I can’t really complain. Other than that it’s great! I’m honestly grateful for this game. Don’t take my comparisons seriously though because it’s something I have to get used to in the VR world lol. OH YEAH… I forgot to mention. Since I’m a huge rock and heavy metal fan. I know most of the songs on there.
Great game

Its a fun app and kind of addicting. Also a great arm and shoulder workout if you go hard hahahha. Only downfall is that the included songs are truly s***. It would a be a lot funner with at least SOME songs we've heard of not these no name bands. Like even the songs on the add on packs are old as hell. Like the devs couldn't do better than 20+ year old songs?
No new real song updates in almost a year…? Great game.

reviews.review_title: This game is WAY too addicting 😂
reviews.review_description:
I don’t any know music instruments, I can’t read notes… but somehow this game made me feel like a real drummer.

Smash Drums is pure fun — the music, the visuals, and the workout are insane. I start playing “just one song” and suddenly an hour is gone and my arms are dead 💀

If you ever wanted to play drums without buying a drum set or annoying your neighbors, this is it.

Warning: you will sweat, you will miss beats, and you will still feel awesome doing it 🤘🔥

reviews.review_title: Fun but not like playing real drums
reviews.review_description: The game is pretty fun. I play in arcade mode mostly because I just can't get a hang of the classic version. It doesn't register most of my hits and I can't figure out why. The songs are good, and there are a lot of song add-ons you can buy. The only thing is it doesn't replicate playing real drums. It's less like playing actual drums and more just following random patterns with your arms. But I guess it never claimed to be an app that teaches you drums. So if you don't care about learning or practicing real drums (Paradiddle is better for that) and just want to waive your arms around to music, it's still a pretty fun game.
Needs more bands likke system of a down, slipknot, Korn, Metallica, ect.
I love it!! I have been playing onto level 11.  Can you add  contemporary worship songs?  That would be AWESOME!!!
Im a drummer and this is pretty close to the real thing

I downloaded this game and I absolutely love it.  I'm 64 years old and have found I can spend about 30 mins and get a pretty good exercise routine out of it.  My one thing if I could get my wish granted would be add more music.  Maybe some older music.  I know a few of the songs listed, but most I've never heard of the song or artist.  Other than more variety, I love this game!
Might be me gateway to rhythm games and drums
This is a blast
Very frustrating game. ￼
If you play drums or don't wanna spend the money for beat saber you should definitely get this game. it's basically rock version of beat saber
Wow just wow. I love it addicted. Playing my favourite songs is just an experience. Got me into playing and performing music with my friends. Cannot recommend any higher it’s the peak of VR
This game really fun and has a good  selection of songs i recommend getting this game
Still lacks most big hit songs, but it has more than most

So good I don’t have drums but the best game for beginner drummers literally like  playing real drums plus it shows where to hit on fusion mode  classic is kinda hard but press two back buttons it makes the drumsticks spin! And it’s like buying a $20 drum set that’s actually awesome!

reviews.review_title: This game is the system seller to me!
reviews.review_description:
Honestly it's so good, I would keep my headset for this game alone. I keep coming back to it and I barely play any other games at all. I also played other rhythm and drums games but this one is the best.

The campaign update has been such a great addition to an already stellar game, I hope they keep bringing updates and even more DLC - I wouldn't hesitate buying everything for this game.
